history.content:
**✅ Prometheus gateway rebooted and Telegram polling resumed.**

**What's live from this morning's work:**
- Fixed Anthropic adapter tool_use/tool_result pairing (deterministic ID tracking, malformed payloads now downgraded to text)
- Hardened switch_model fail-open behavior across chat.router, subagent-executor, and dynamic provider wording
- Updated prompt-context.ts to inject full intraday notes without truncation (Tier-2/3 context now includes TODAY_NOTES)

All three changes built and verified (tsc exit 0). Gateway is ready. What would you like me to check or continue with?
